questions.question: Factor out the greatest common factor from $2x + 6$
Tom has $15 to spend on video games and $12 on snacks at a gaming store. What is the greatest common factor of the amounts Tom can spend?
A book costs $24 and a pen costs $8. What is the greatest common factor of the costs?
Factor out the greatest common factor from $18y - 24$

A group of friends want to share some candy equally. If they have $48$ pieces and there are $8$ friends, how many pieces will each friend get if they factor out the greatest common factor of the total number of pieces and the number of friends?
A bakery sells $12$ cupcakes and $15$ muffins. What is the greatest common factor of the number of cupcakes and muffins sold?
Simplify the expression $25x^2 + 30x$ by factoring and show your work. Assume x is a positive integer.

A store has $36$ boxes of pens and $24$ boxes of pencils to pack into carts that hold $12$ boxes each. What is the greatest common factor of the number of boxes of pens and pencils, and how many carts can be filled with the boxes of pens and the boxes of pencils separately? Show your work and calculations.

teacher_rules: Read each question carefully before answering.
Show your work and calculations for free response questions.
Use a calculator only when necessary and make sure to show the calculation steps.
